headline: Undefeated Arkansas visits undefeated Notre Dame in Week 2
subhead: Two top-ranked teams clash in South Bend with playoff positioning on the line.

xFactor.why: Arkansas looked vulnerable in the secondary against Boston College's vertical passing game and will face a Notre Dame offense that just moved the ball at will against UCLA.

keyMatchup: Arkansas's pass rush, which generated only modest pressure in Week 1, must disrupt Notre Dame's rhythm early before the home crowd advantage allows the Irish to settle into their tempo.
body: Arkansas earned the top ranking with a defensive grind against Boston College, holding a 9-point lead through three quarters before the Eagles mounted late pressure. The Razorbacks' run-heavy approach and bend-don't-break mentality will face its stiffest test yet against a Notre Dame team that dissected UCLA's defense for 45 points. The Irish quarterback and receiving corps moved the ball with efficiency and timing, and that execution in a hostile environment suggests Notre Dame has the offensive firepower to exploit any Arkansas defensive lapses.

The game's complexion hinges on whether Arkansas can generate enough defensive disruption to force mistakes. South Bend is a steep climb for any road team in Week 2, and Arkansas's one-score margin of victory in Week 1 hints at a team still finding its complete form. Notre Dame's home-field advantage, combined with an offense that looked far more polished than Arkansas's defensive showing, gives the Irish a narrow edge in a matchup that could easily flip with one turnover or special-teams play.
